title: Lankesterella pilosa

The genus Lankesterella is a small group of orchids, and Lankesterella pilosa is one of the species within this group. Lankesterella pilosa is also a member of the subtribe Cranichidinae, which includes various types of orchids. The classification of Lankesterella pilosa is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other orchid species.
